description_long: This is a medium-sized apple with a predominantly red skin, interspersed with yellow-green patches and subtle speckles. The apple has a rounded, slightly asymmetrical shape with a shallow stem cavity visible from the top. Its surface appears smooth and glossy, with a natural sheen that highlights its freshness. A barcode sticker is attached to one side, indicating it is store-bought. The base of the apple is slightly flattened, and the skin shows minor natural imperfections but no major blemishes. The apple rests on a light-colored, slightly curved surface that casts a soft shadow.
description: A glossy, red apple with yellow-green patches and a barcode sticker, resting on a light surface.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the stem cavity and red-yellow skin.
description_view_1: Side view with barcode sticker visible and some shadowing.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the apple's base and color gradient.
description_view_3: Rear side view with more shadow and less visible detail.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: minor natural imperfections, no major blemishes
